certificate.permits_boundary:
permits:
  exec: false
  tools: ["nika:emit", "nika:fetch", "nika:hash", "nika:json_diff", "nika:json_merge_patch", "nika:notify", "nika:read"]

# review — effects too dynamic to pin statically:
#   · task `live` reaches a dynamic URL — `net.http` cannot express 'any host'; add the resolved host(s) before running
#   · task `baseline` uses a dynamic path — `fs` cannot express 'any path'; add the resolved path(s) before running
#   · task `alert` reaches a dynamic URL — `net.http` cannot express 'any host'; add the resolved host(s) before running
